recommendations.title: Searching

recommendations.title: Trauma
recommendations.overview: A young Romanian woman and a recovering drug addict launch an unlikely investigation after her parents are murdered by a vicious serial killer known as The Headhunter.

recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.

recommendations.title: Operation Hyacinth
recommendations.overview: Not satisfied with the result of a murder investigation in Warsaw's gay community, an officer in 1980s communist Poland resolves to uncover the truth.

recommendations.title: Kahaani
recommendations.overview: Pregnant and alone in the city of Kolkata, a woman begins a relentless search for her missing husband, only to find that nothing is what it seems.

recommendations.title: Vidocq
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Action, Thriller, Crime, Science Fiction, Mystery
recommendations.overview: Paris, 1830. In the heart of the town, Vidocq, a famous detective, disappears as he fights the Alchemist, an assassin that he has been pursuing for a few months. His young biographer, Etienne Boisset, decides to avenge Vidocq's death and takes the in

recommendations.title: The Wicker Man
recommendations.overview: Police sergeant Neil Howie is called to an island village in search of a missing girl whom the locals claim never existed. The investigation is further complicated as Howie’s religious views clash with those of the island’s residents.

recommendations.title: American Woman
recommendations.overview: A young grandmother in a small Pennsylvania town raises her daughter's child after the girl disappears. All the while, a desperate search for her continues.

recommendations.title: Jai Bhim

recommendations.title: Edge of Darkness
